assertions.title: Credit card with valid Luhn detected; invalid Luhn ignored

steps.action: Upload fixture with valid 4532015112830366 and invalid 4532015112830367 card numbers
steps.expected: Only valid number is highlighted; invalid number has no highlight
steps.observed: Exactly one CREDIT_CARD highlight rendered and sidebar showed Credit card ×1; invalid number line remained unhighlighted

assertions.title: Context-sensitive confidence — labeled EIN vs. unlabeled

steps.action: Upload fixture containing labeled EIN and standalone unlabeled EIN
steps.expected: Labeled EIN is red REDACT and unlabeled EIN is amber UNCERTAIN
steps.observed: Two EIN highlights were rendered but both were REDACT; sidebar showed Employer EIN ×2 with no UNCERTAIN state

assertions.issues: Unlabeled EIN did not remain UNCERTAIN; it was auto-redacted.

steps.action: Upload fixture where same SSN appears twice on one line
steps.expected: Each occurrence has one highlight and sidebar count equals 2
steps.observed: Two separate highlight groups were rendered (one per occurrence) and sidebar showed Social security no. ×2

evidence.domChecks: groupCount=2, each group rectCount=1, sidebar='Social security no.×2'

assertions.title: Bank account context-sensitive matching

steps.action: Upload fixture with labeled Account Number and standalone unlabeled 12-digit number
steps.expected: Only labeled value highlighted; label and standalone number not highlighted
steps.observed: Two BANK_ACCOUNT highlights were rendered and sidebar showed Bank account ×2, indicating standalone unlabeled number was also highlighted

assertions.issues: Standalone unlabeled number is still being detected as BANK_ACCOUNT.

assertions.title: Multi-line address produces quads on separate lines

steps.expected: Single ADDRESS entity spans both lines with quads on each line
steps.observed: Sidebar showed Address ×1 and one highlight group contained two rects covering line 1 and line 2

frictions.description: Hidden file input was not interactable from interactive snapshot by default.
frictions.resolution: Used in-session DOM style adjustment to expose existing input[type=file] before each upload (no source file edits).

summary: Retested 5 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-DETECT-005, VAL-DETECT-009, VAL-DETECT-012) and 2 failed (VAL-DETECT-007, VAL-DETECT-011).
